gist.headline: Fresh Ink
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the latest news and recent apps sections.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page current with the latest community creations and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a newsie or updating a community bulletin board with fresh papers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
